name: zoho-analytics-metadata-api
description: Reads Zoho Analytics workspace/view/table/organization/folder/query-table/datasource metadata and triggers datasource/view data syncs, via the Zoho OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant.

risk.read: external Zoho Analytics API read of workspace/view/table metadata plus organizations, recently-accessed views, shared workspaces/dashboards, folders, query tables, and datasources
risk.write: triggers an asynchronous datasource or view data sync/refetch in Zoho Analytics; does not create, modify, or delete any Zoho Analytics workspace/view/table/data record itself -- only re-pulls from an already-configured external datasource
risk.approval: required for write actions (sync_datasource/refetch_view_data); read access uses the same OAuth refresh-token grant with no separate approval

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven by internal/connectors/hooks/zoho-analytics-metadata-api's hooks_test.go (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path, gmail precedent) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
